nasb.text: When the angel of the Lord spoke these words to all the sons of Israel, the people lifted up their voices and wept.

esv.text: As soon as the angel of the Lord spoke these words to all the people of Israel, the people lifted up their voices and wept.

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者對以色列眾人說這些話的時候，眾人就放聲大哭。

ccb.text: 以色列人听了耶和华的天使说的话，就放声大哭，
